description.value: Create 3 illusory duplicates of yourself. When attacked, roll 1d8: 1-2 = hits you, 3-8 = hits a duplicate (which is destroyed). Each duplicate destroyed removes 2 from the "hits duplicate" range.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = fails
- 1 = 1 duplicate (1 round)
- 2 = 3 duplicates (1 minute)
- 3 = 4 duplicates (10 minutes)
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
